story.text:
# ✨ Bind ZK
**📜(claim) → 🔮(circuit) → 🌑(witness-without-revealing)**
*aletheia · zk · V38*

Bind a claim into a zero-knowledge circuit. Aletheia is the persona; V38 is the vertex; the binding is the act.

> What you can prove without revealing is what you may publish without losing.

*Keywords:* bind · zk · circuit · claim · v25 · aletheia
